hooks.command: jq -c 'if ((.prompt // "") | test("^\\s*/flow:implement(\\s|$)")) then {"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "UserPromptSubmit", "additionalContext": "INSTRUCTION: The /flow:implement skill must always run inside a git worktree. Before invoking the skill, call EnterWorktree first to create an isolated worktree for this work. Do not run /flow:implement on a branch in the main repo checkout."}} else empty end'
